Items.Title: Xamarin Android: Create Login Using SQLite Database | Xamarin Android：使用 SQLite 数据库创建登录 | iFour Technolab iFour 技术实验室 | Xamarin Android: Create Login Using SQLite Database | iFour Technolab
Items.Description:
这种模式允许开发人员用一种语言编写他们所有的业务逻辑（或重用现有的应用程序代码），但在每个平台上实现原始性能、外观和感觉。

什么是 SQLite？

对于许多应用程序而言，无论是直接使用还是由第三方包装器使用，SQLite 都是应用程序的主干。 我们今天将使用 Android SQLite 数据库创建它。

它默认嵌入在 Android 中。 因此，不需要数据库设置或管理工作。

现在让我们一步一步来如何在 Xamarin Android 中创建登录表单

我们将在 Visual Studio 2019 中创建此项目，因此您也应该尝试使用最新版本。

第一步：选择一个新项目

打开 Visual Studio -> 创建新项目 -> Android App (Xamarin)

然后单击下一步按钮。 注意图像的亮点，如图所示。我们为手机构建，因此需要选择手机。

第 2 步：给出项目名称

你可以给你的项目起你想要的名字。 输入您的项目名称并单击创建按钮，我们已将项目命名为 SQLite，您可以在 Image 中看到它。

第三步：选择模板

从这里，你可以选择任何你想要的。 都是模板。 我们只需要一个页面，因此我们将选择一个单一视图应用程序。如果您需要导航，您还可以选择第二个选项导航抽屉，它将为您提供导航。

如果您需要选项卡菜单，您还可以选择第三个选项选项卡式应用程序，它将为您提供一个选项卡菜单。

阅读更多： Xamarin Forms 5.0 路线图

如果您需要空白页，请选择最后一个空白页选项。在最低 Android 版本中尽可能选择低级别，因为这样做有助于您在低设备中运行。

然后点击确定

现在我们的项目已准备好作为普通模板。 现在我们将添加布局、NuGet 包、所需的类和接口。

第 4 步：添加布局

接下来，转到解决方案资源管理器-> 项目名称 (SQLite) -> 资源文件夹 -> 布局文件夹。 右键单击添加 -> 添加项目。 将打开一个新对话框。 选择 Android 布局，为 NewUser.xml 命名并单击添加按钮，如图所示。

现在新的布局页面已准备好进行设计。我们将在此文件中编写我们的设计代码。

第 5 步：添加活动类

现在我们将向我们的项目添加一个 Activity 类，我们将在其中编写注册相关业务逻辑代码。

转到解决方案资源管理器-> 项目名称 (SQLite)。右键单击添加 -> 添加项目。 如镜像所显示，打开一个新的对话框。 选择 Activity 并为 RegisterActivity.cs 命名。 现在，添加新的活动类。

第 6 步：添加表格

接下来，我们需要创建一个数据库表，所以我们在文件中创建一个数据层类，我们会编写代码来做表，比如id，name，password等。

转到解决方案资源管理器-> 项目名称 (SQLite)。右键单击添加 -> 添加项目。 如镜像所显示，打开一个新对话框。 选择 Class，为 LoginTable.cs 命名

第 7 步：NuGet 包

现在我们将安装 NuGet 包。

转到解决方案资源管理器（右侧）-> 项目名称（SQLite）右键单击-> 选择管理 NuGet 包。

第八步：安装 NuGet 包

计划雇用Xamarin 应用程序开发公司？ 您的搜索到此结束。

该软件包将帮助我们连接数据库并提供所需的方法。

第 9 步：LoginTable.cs 文件

接下来，转到解决方案资源管理器打开 LoginTable.cs 文件，然后输入以下代码。

 namespace SQLite { classLoginTab { [PrimaryKey, AutoIncrement] publicint id { get; set; } [MaxLength(50)] // Maxlength set in UserName column publicstringuserName{ get; set; } [MaxLength(20)] // Maxlength set in passWord column publicstringpassWord{ get; set; } } }

第十步：MainActivity.cs文件

接下来，转到解决方案资源管理器打开 MainActivity.cs 文件，然后输入以下代码。

 namespace SQLite { publicclassMainActivity :AppCompatActivity { EditTextuserName; EditText Password; Button ncreate; Button nsign; protectedoverridevoidOnCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) { base.OnCreate(savedInstanceState); Xamarin.Essentials.Platform.Init(this, savedInstanceState); SetContentView(Resource.Layout.activity_main); Android.Support.V7.Widget.Toolbar toolbar = FindViewById<android.support.v7.widget.toolbar>(Resource.Id.toolbar); SetSupportActionBar(toolbar); FloatingActionButton fab = FindViewById<floatingactionbutton>(Resource.Id.fab); fab.Click += FabOnClick; base.OnCreate(savedInstanceState); SetContentView(Resource.Layout.Main); btnsign = FindViewById<button>(Resource.Id.nlogin); btncreate = FindViewById</button></floatingactionbutton></android.support.v7.widget.toolbar><button>Resource.Id.nregister); txtusername = FindViewById<edittext>(Resource.Id.username); txtPassword = FindViewById<edittext>(Resource.Id.pwd); btnsign.Click += nsign_Click; btncreate.Click += ncreate_Click; CreateTable(); } privatevoidncreate_Click(object send, EventArgs eve) { StartActivity(typeof(RegisterActivity)); } privatevoidnsign_Click(object send, EventArgs eve) { try { stringdpPaths = Path.Combine(System.Environment.GetFolderPath(System.Environment.SpecialFolder.Personal), "user,mydb"); vardbs = newSQLiteConnection(dpPaths); var data = dbs.Table<logintable>(); var data11 = data.Where(x =>x.username == username.Text&&x.password == Password.Text).FirstOrDefault(); if (data11 != null) { Toast.MakeText(this, "Successfully Login", ToastLength.Short).Show(); } else { Toast.MakeText(this, "Username or Password invalid", ToastLength.Long).Show(); } } catch (Exception ex) { Toast.MakeText(this, ex.ToString(), ToastLength.Long).Show(); } } publicstringCreateTable() { var op = ""; op += "Creating Databse if it doesnt exists"; stringdpPaths = Path.Combine(System.Environment.GetFolderPath(System.Environment.SpecialFolder.Personal), "user,mydb"); vardbs = newSQLiteConnection(dpPaths); op += " Databasesucessfully Created...."; return op; }</logintable></edittext></edittext></button>

第 11 步：RegisterActivity.cs 文件接下来，转到解决方案资源管理器打开 RegisterActivity.cs 文件，并输入以下代码。



原文:

Xamarin is an open-source platform for creating modern and performance applications with .NET for iOS, Android, and Windows. This pattern allows developers to write all of their business logic in one language (or reuse existing application code) but achieve original performance, look and feel on each platform.

What is SQLite?

Android SQLite is the most preferred way to store data for Android applications. For many applications, SQLite is the backbone of applications whether used directly or by a third-party wrapper. We will create it today using the Android SQLite database.

It is embedded in Android By default. Therefore, no database setup or administrative work is required.

Now let's go step by step how to create a login form in Xamarin Android

We will create this project in Visual Studio 2019, so you too should try to use the latest versions.

Step 1: Select a new project

Open Visual Studio -> Create New Project ->Android App (Xamarin)

Then click on the Next button. Note the highlight point of the image as shown in the image.We build for mobiles so mobiles need to be selected.

Step 2 : Give the project name

You can give your project the name you want. Enter the name of your project and click on the Create buttonwe have named our project SQLite which you can see in Image.

Step 3: Select template

From this, you can select whatever you want. All are templates. We only need a single page so we will select a single view app.If you need navigation you can also select the second option navigation drawer which will provide you navigation.

If you need a tab menu, you can also select the third option Tabbed App which will provide you a tab menu.

Read More: Roadmap To Xamarin Forms 5.0

If you need a blank page then select the last option which will be a blank page.Select a low level whenever possible in the minimum Android version as doing so will help you run in Low device.

Then click on OK

Now our project is ready as a normal template. Now we will add layout, NuGet package, required class, and interface.

Step 4:Add Layout

Next, go to Solution Explorer-> Project Name (SQLite) ->Resources Folder ->layout Folder. Right-click on Add -> Add item. A new dialog box will open. Select Android the layout, give a name for NewUser.xml and click Add buttonas shown in the image.

Now new Layout Page ready for Design.We will write our design code in this file.

Step 5: Add Activity Class

Now we will add an Activity class to our project in which we will write the Register Related Business Logic code.

Go to Solution Explorer-> Project Name (SQLite).Right-click on Add -> Add item. Open new a dialog boxas shown in the image. Select Activity and give name for RegisterActivity.cs. Now, add the New Activity Class.

Step 6: Add Table

Next, we need to create a database table, so we create a data layer class in the file, we will write the code to do the table, such as id, name, password, etc.

Go to Solution Explorer-> Project Name (SQLite).Right-click to Add -> Add item. Open a new dialog boxas shown in the image. Select Class, give a name for LoginTable.cs

Step 7 : NuGet package

Now we will install the NuGet package.

Go to Solution Explorer (Right -side)-> Project Name (SQLite) Right click -> Select Manage NuGet Packages.

Step 8:Install NuGet package

Once the NuGet window opens, click on Browser from the above tab and search for SQLite package and install packages.

Planning to Hire Xamarin App Development Company? Your Search ends here.

This package will help us to connect with the database as well as provide the required methodology.

Step 9 : LoginTable.cs File

Next, Go to Solution Explorer open the LoginTable.cs file, and put the below code.

namespace SQLite
{
classLoginTab
{
[PrimaryKey, AutoIncrement]
publicint id { get; set; } 
[MaxLength(50)] // Maxlength set in UserName column
publicstringuserName{ get; set; }
[MaxLength(20)] // Maxlength set in passWord column
publicstringpassWord{ get; set; }
}
}

Step 10:MainActivity.cs File

Next, Go to Solution Explorer open the MainActivity.cs file, and put the below code.


namespace SQLite
{

CreateTable();

try
{
stringdpPaths = Path.Combine(System.Environment.GetFolderPath(System.Environment.SpecialFolder.Personal), "user,mydb");

Items.Title: 如何在 Chakra UI 和 React JS 中创建现代卡片⚡️ | How to Create Modern Cards in Chakra UI & React JS ⚡️
Items.Description:
弗雷迪·安德烈

发表于有时，创建出色的 UI 不仅需要时间，还需要注意力。 即使涉及到某些卡片，对结构、间距、调色板等的关注也非常重要。

如今，我们可以肯定地说，卡片已成为网站和移动应用程序 UI 的设计趋势和主要内容，我们有来自 Revolut、Apple 和 Google 等大公司的示例，它们在其网站和应用程序上使用交互式和现代卡片来为客户提供和用户在使用他们的解决方案方面有很好的体验！

因此，当我们开始设计和开发卡片时，我们需要考虑一些重要方面：

  • 卡片内容应该非常紧凑和直观，因此我们需要将其保持在单个卡片结构中。

  • 整张卡片应该很容易阅读和使用。 这个方面决定了用户界面和用户体验的好坏。 所以我们需要注意让它干净通风（设计提示：不要害怕使用空格，尽可能多地使用它）。

  • 卡片应该只包含会暴露信息的重要元素，正如我上面所说，我们需要保持卡片清洁和通风。 例如，一张 CTA 卡片应该包含一个标题、副标题，可能还有一张图片，以及一个用于执行操作的 CTA 按钮。

定义 UI Cards 受欢迎程度的另一个重要方面是它们促进了响应式 UI 设计，由于它们的方形形状非常适合任何网格结构，因此它们可以轻松缩小到任何设备分辨率。

让我们直接看我们的卡片示例！

在今天的示例中，我们将根据最新的 UI 趋势制作三张简单的卡片。 我们从 Horizo​​n UI React 卡片中获得了一些设计灵感，您可以在他们的网站上看到更多类似这样的很棒的免费 React 卡片。

太好了，让我们编码吧！

正如你已经看到的，我们今天要用来构建漂亮卡片的 React JS 库是 Chakra UI。 此外，我们将从Chakra 主题工具和React 图标等工具中获得一些帮助。

首先，让我们安装 Chakra UI 及其上面的附加组件：

 npm i @chakra-ui/react @chakra-ui/theme @chakra-ui/theme-tools react-icons

在此之后，我们需要创建一个style.js文件并输入以下样式：

 // @src/theme/styles.js import { mode } from " @chakra-ui/theme-tools " ; export const globalStyles = { colors : { gray : { 700 : " #1f2733 " , }, navy : { 50 : " #d0dcfb " , 100 : " #aac0fe " , 200 : " #a3b9f8 " , 300 : " #728fea " , 400 : " #3652ba " , 500 : " #1b3bbb " , 600 : " #24388a " , 700 : " #1b254b " , 800 : " #111c44 " , 900 : " #0b1437 " , }, brand : { 50 : " #cbbff8 " , 100 : " #876cea " , 200 : " #582CFF " , 300 : " #542de1 " , 400 : " #7551FF " , 500 : " #4318FF " , 600 : " #300eaa " , 700 : " #1c0377 " , 800 : " #130156 " , 900 : " #0e0042 " , }, }, styles : { global : ( props ) => ({ body : { overflowX : " hidden " , bg : mode ( " gray.50 " , " #1B254B " )( props ), }, html : { fontFamily : " Helvetica, sans-serif " , }, }), }, };

伟大的！ 在/theme的components文件夹中，我们修改了各种 Chakra UI 组件，例如 or ，要使用它们，我们需要为我们拥有的每个组件（ badge.js 、 button.js和breakpoints.js ）创建一个包含所有样式文件的特殊文件夹！

为以下组件制作一个特殊文件：

徽章.js

 // @src/theme/components/badge.js export const badgeStyles = { components : { Badge : { sizes : { md : { width : " 65px " , height : " 25px " } }, baseStyle : { textTransform : " capitalize " } } } }

按钮.js

 // @src/theme/components/button.js import { mode } from " @chakra-ui/theme-tools " ; export const buttonStyles = { components : { Button : { variants : { primary : { fontSize : " 10px " , bg : " blue.400 " , color : " #fff " , _hover : { bg : " blue.300 " }, _focus : { bg : " blue.300 " }, _active : { bg : " blue.300 " }, }, navy : { fontSize : " 10px " , bg : " navy.900 " , color : " #fff " , _hover : { bg : " navy.900 " }, _focus : { bg : " navy.900 " }, _active : { bg : " navy.900 " }, }, " no-effects " : { _hover : " none " , _active : " none " , _focus : " none " , }, danger : () => ({ color : " white " , bg : " red.500 " , fontSize : " 10px " , _hover : " red.400 " , _focus : " red.400 " , _active : " red.400 " , }), outlined : ( props ) => ({ color : mode ( " blue.400 " , " white " )( props ), bg : " transparent " , fontSize : " 10px " , border : " 1px solid " , borderColor : { bg : mode ( " blue.400 " , " white " )( props )}, _hover : { bg : mode ( " blue.50 " , " transparent " )( props ) }, _focus : { bg : mode ( " blue.50 " , " transparent " )( props ) }, _active : { bg : mode ( " blue.50 " , " transparent " )( props ) }, }), dark : ( props ) => ({ color : " white " , bg : mode ( " gray.700 " , " blue.500 " )( props ), fontSize : " 10px " , _hover : { bg : mode ( " gray.700 " , " blue.500 " )( props ) }, _focus : { bg : mode ( " gray.700 " , " blue.600 " )( props ) }, _active : { bg : mode ( " gray.700 " , " blue.400 " )( props ) }, }), light : ( props ) => ({ color : mode ( " gray.700 " , " gray.700 " )( props ), bg : mode ( " gray.100 " , " white " )( props ), fontSize : " 10px " , _hover : { bg : mode ( " gray.50 " , " white " )( props ) }, _focus : { bg : mode ( " gray.50 " , " white " )( props ) }, _active : { bg : mode ( " gray.50 " , " white " )( props ) }, }), }, baseStyle : { fontWeight : " bold " , borderRadius : " 8px " , fontSize : " 10px " , }, }, }, };

在我们修改了一般样式之后，设置其他断点以提高响应的准确性也会有所帮助。 使用以下代码创建一个breakpoints.js文件：

 // @src/theme/theme.js import { extendTheme } from " @chakra-ui/react " ; import { globalStyles } from " ./styles " ; import { breakpoints } from " ./foundations/breakpoints " ; import { buttonStyles } from " ./components/button " ; import { badgeStyles } from " ./components/badge " ; export default extendTheme ( { breakpoints }, // Breakpoints globalStyles , // Global styles buttonStyles , // Button styles badgeStyles , // Badge styles );

之后，在index.js中，将主题添加到零件：

 // @src/index.js import React from ' react ' ; import ReactDOM from ' react-dom ' ; import App from ' App ' ; import { ChakraProvider } from " @chakra-ui/react " ; // Custom Chakra theme import theme from " theme/theme.js " ; ReactDOM . render ( < ChakraProvider theme = { theme } resetCss = { false } position = " relative " > < App /> < /ChakraProvider> , document . getElementById ( " root " ) );

惊人的！ 让我们开始编写 Chakra UI + React 卡片的结构吧！ 我们需要做的就是为每个人制作一个特殊的文件并粘贴下面的代码：

脉轮 UI - 个人资料卡


 // @src/components/Profile.js import React from " react " ; // Chakra imports import { Flex , Image , Text , useColorModeValue } from " @chakra-ui/react " ; function Profile () { let boxBg = useColorModeValue ( " white !important " , " #111c44 !important " ); let mainText = useColorModeValue ( " gray.800 " , " white " ); let secondaryText = useColorModeValue ( " gray.400 " , " gray.400 " ); return ( < Flex borderRadius = ' 20px ' bg = { boxBg } p = ' 20px ' h = ' 345px ' w = {{ base : " 315px " , md : " 345px " }} alignItems = ' center ' direction = ' column ' > < Image src = ' https://i.ibb.co/xmP2pS6/Profile.png ' maxW = ' 100% ' borderRadius = ' 20px ' /> < Flex flexDirection = ' column ' mb = ' 30px ' > < Image src = ' https://i.ibb.co/B3gYTYs/Profile-Image.png ' border = ' 5px solid red ' mx = ' auto ' borderColor = { boxBg } width = ' 68px ' height = ' 68px ' mt = ' -38px ' borderRadius = ' 50% ' /> < Text fontWeight = ' 600 ' color = { mainText } textAlign = ' center ' fontSize = ' xl ' > Adela Parkson < /Text > < Text color = { secondaryText } textAlign = ' center ' fontSize = ' sm ' fontWeight = ' 500 ' > Product Designer < /Text > < /Flex > < Flex justify = ' space-between ' w = ' 100% ' px = ' 36px ' > < Flex flexDirection = ' column ' > < Text fontWeight = ' 600 ' color = { mainText } fontSize = ' xl ' textAlign = ' center ' > 17 < /Text > < Text color = { secondaryText } fontWeight = ' 500 ' > Posts < /Text > < /Flex > < Flex flexDirection = ' column ' > < Text fontWeight = ' 600 ' color = { mainText } fontSize = ' xl ' textAlign = ' center ' > 9.7 k < /Text > < Text color = { secondaryText } fontWeight = ' 500 ' > Followers < /Text > < /Flex > < Flex flexDirection = ' column ' > < Text fontWeight = ' 600 ' fontSize = ' xl ' color = { mainText } textAlign = ' center ' > 274 < /Text > < Text color = { secondaryText } fontWeight = ' 500 ' > Following < /Text > < /Flex > < /Flex > < /Flex > ); } export default Profile ;

脉轮 UI - 团队卡


 // @src/components/Teams.js import React from " react " ; // Chakra imports import { Avatar , AvatarGroup , Badge , Flex , Button , Icon , Image , Text , DarkMode , useColorModeValue , } from " @chakra-ui/react " ; // Assets import { MdPeople } from " react-icons/md " ; import { IoEllipsisHorizontalSharp } from " react-icons/io5 " ; function Teams () { let boxBg = useColorModeValue ( " white !important " , " #111c44 !important " ); let mainText = useColorModeValue ( " gray.800 " , " white " ); let iconBox = useColorModeValue ( " gray.100 " , " whiteAlpha.200 " ); let iconColor = useColorModeValue ( " brand.200 " , " white " ); return ( < Flex borderRadius = ' 20px ' bg = { boxBg } p = ' 20px ' h = ' 345px ' w = {{ base : " 315px " , md : " 345px " }} alignItems = ' center ' direction = ' column ' > < Flex w = ' 100% ' mb = ' 18px ' > < Flex w = ' 38px ' h = ' 38px ' align = ' center ' justify = ' center ' borderRadius = ' 50% ' me = ' 12px ' bg = { iconBox } > < Icon w = ' 24px ' h = ' 24px ' as = { MdPeople } color = { iconColor } / > < /Flex > < Text my = ' auto ' fontWeight = ' 600 ' color = { mainText } textAlign = ' center ' fontSize = ' xl ' me = ' auto ' > Teams < /Text > < Button w = ' 38px ' h = ' 38px ' align = ' center ' justify = ' center ' borderRadius = ' 12px ' me = ' 12px ' bg = { iconBox } > < Icon w = ' 24px ' h = ' 24px ' as = { IoEllipsisHorizontalSharp } color = { iconColor } / > < /Button > < /Flex > < Image src = ' https://i.ibb.co/KVwmVGW/Teams-Image.png ' maxW = ' 100% ' borderRadius = ' 20px ' mb = ' 10px ' /> < Text fontWeight = ' 600 ' color = { mainText } textAlign = ' start ' fontSize = ' xl ' w = ' 100% ' > Simmmple Web < /Text > < Flex mt = ' auto ' justify = ' space-between ' w = ' 100% ' align = ' center ' > < DarkMode > < Badge borderRadius = ' 9px ' size = ' md ' colorScheme = ' green ' color = ' green.400 ' textAlign = ' center ' display = ' flex ' justifyContent = ' center ' alignItems = ' center ' https://i.ibb.co/8mcrvQk/avatar4.png ' /> < /AvatarGroup > < /Flex > < /Flex > ); } export default Teams ;

恭喜！ 伟大的！ 现在在我们的App.js中，我们将导入我们创建的卡片组件！ 导入应如下所示：

 // Components Import import Product from " ./components/Product " ; import Profile from " ./components/Profile " ; import Teams from " ./components/Teams " ;

结论和资源⭐️

在本文中，我们已经能够使用 Chakra UI 构建完整且完全响应的卡片。 我希望你觉得它有用且有趣！

在这里，您将找到包含上述卡片的今天项目的 .zip 文件！

另外，我真的建议您看看并尝试Horizo​​n UI ，您会发现更多精彩的卡片，如本文中的卡片、现代图表以及许多其他令人惊叹的 UI 元素。 您将在功能精美的管理仪表板中找到它们，该仪表板可响应所有设备！ 并且是免费和开源的！ 谢谢阅读！

原文:

Fredy Andrei

Posted on May 16

Sometimes creating a great UI requires, not just time, but attention as well. Even when it comes to some cards, the attention to structure, spacings, color palette, and so on... is more than important.

These days, we can safely say that cards have become a design trend & staple across websites and mobile app UIs, we have examples from big companies like Revolut, Apple & Google that use interactive & modern cards on their websites and apps to give their customers and users a great experience in using their solutions!

So, when we start designing & developing a card we need to take into consideration some important aspects:

  • The card content should be very compact and intuitive, so we need to keep it in a single card structure.

  • The whole card should be very easy to read and use. This aspect makes the difference between a great and a bad UI & UX. So we need to pay attention to making it clean and airy (design tip: don't be afraid to use whitespace, use it as much as you can).

  • The card should have just the important elements that will expose the information, as I said above, we need to keep the card clean & airy. For example, a CTA card should contain a title, subtitle, maybe an image, and a CTA button that will make the action.

One more important aspect that defines the popularity of UI Cards is that they facilitate responsive UI design, they can easily scale down to any device resolution due to their squared shape that fits perfectly in any grid structure.

Let's get straight to our cards examples!

In today's example, we will make three simple cards updated to the latest UI trends. We've taken some design inspiration from Horizon UI React cards, you can see more awesome free react cards like this on their website.

Great, let's code them!

As you already saw, the React JS library that we are going to use today to build our beautiful cards is Chakra UI. Also, we are going to get some help from tools such as Chakra theme tools & React icons.

First of all, let's install Chakra UI & its above add-ons:

npm i @chakra-ui/react @chakra-ui/theme @chakra-ui/theme-tools react-icons

After this, we need to make a style.js file and type the following styles:

// @src/theme/styles.js import { mode } from "@chakra-ui/theme-tools"; export const globalStyles = { colors: { gray: { 700: "#1f2733", }, navy: { 50: "#d0dcfb", 100: "#aac0fe", 200: "#a3b9f8", 300: "#728fea", 400: "#3652ba", 500: "#1b3bbb", 600: "#24388a", 700: "#1b254b", 800: "#111c44", 900: "#0b1437", }, brand: { 50: "#cbbff8", 100: "#876cea", 200: "#582CFF", 300: "#542de1", 400: "#7551FF", 500: "#4318FF", 600: "#300eaa", 700: "#1c0377", 800: "#130156", 900: "#0e0042", }, }, styles: { global: (props) => ({ body: { overflowX: "hidden", bg: mode("gray.50", "#1B254B")(props), }, html: { fontFamily: "Helvetica, sans-serif", }, }), },
};

Great! In the components folder in /theme, we modified various Chakra UI components like or , to use them we need to make a special folder with all styles files for each component we have (badge.js, button.js & breakpoints.js)!

Make a special file for the components below:

badge.js 

// @src/theme/components/badge.js export const badgeStyles = { components: { Badge: { sizes: { md: { width: "65px", height: "25px" } }, baseStyle: { textTransform: "capitalize" } } }
}

button.js 

// @src/theme/components/button.js import { mode } from "@chakra-ui/theme-tools";
export const buttonStyles = { components: { Button: { variants: { primary: { fontSize: "10px", bg: "blue.400", color: "#fff", _hover: { bg: "blue.300" }, _focus: { bg: "blue.300" }, _active: { bg: "blue.300" }, }, navy: { fontSize: "10px", bg: "navy.900", color: "#fff", _hover: { bg: "navy.900" }, _focus: { bg: "navy.900" }, _active: { bg: "navy.900" }, }, "no-effects": { _hover: "none", _active: "none", _focus: "none", }, danger: () => ({ color: "white", bg: "red.500", fontSize: "10px", _hover: "red.400", _focus: "red.400", _active: "red.400", }), outlined: (props) => ({ color: mode("blue.400", "white")(props), bg: "transparent", fontSize: "10px", border: "1px solid", borderColor: { bg: mode("blue.400", "white")(props)}, _hover: { bg: mode("blue.50", "transparent")(props) }, _focus: { bg: mode("blue.50", "transparent")(props) }, _active: { bg: mode("blue.50", "transparent")(props) }, }), dark: (props) => ({ color: "white", bg: mode("gray.700", "blue.500")(props), fontSize: "10px", _hover: { bg: mode("gray.700", "blue.500")(props) }, _focus: { bg: mode("gray.700", "blue.600")(props) }, _active: { bg: mode("gray.700", "blue.400")(props) }, }), light: (props) => ({ color: mode("gray.700", "gray.700")(props), bg: mode("gray.100", "white")(props), fontSize: "10px", _hover: { bg: mode("gray.50", "white")(props) }, _focus: { bg: mode("gray.50", "white")(props) }, _active: { bg: mode("gray.50", "white")(props) }, }), }, baseStyle: { fontWeight: "bold", borderRadius: "8px", fontSize: "10px", }, }, },
};

After we have modified general styles, it would also be helpful to set other breakpoints for responsive accuracy. Create a breakpoints.js file with the following code:

// @src/theme/theme.js import { extendTheme } from "@chakra-ui/react";
import { globalStyles } from "./styles";
import { breakpoints } from "./foundations/breakpoints";
import { buttonStyles } from "./components/button";
import { badgeStyles } from "./components/badge";
export default extendTheme( { breakpoints }, // Breakpoints globalStyles, // Global styles buttonStyles, // Button styles badgeStyles, // Badge styles
);

After this, in index.js, add the theme to the component:

// @src/index.js import React from 'react';
import ReactDOM from 'react-dom'; import App from 'App'; import { ChakraProvider } from "@chakra-ui/react";
// Custom Chakra theme
import theme from "theme/theme.js"; ReactDOM.render( <ChakraProvider theme={theme} resetCss={false} position="relative"> <App /> </ChakraProvider>,
 document.getElementById("root")
);

Amazing! Let's start coding the structure of our Chakra UI + React cards! ⚡️

All we need to do is to make a special file for each of them and paste the below code of them:

Chakra UI - Profile Card

Congratulations! 🎉

Great! Now in our App.js, we're going to import the card components that we created! The imports should look like this:

// Components Import
import Product from "./components/Product";
import Profile from "./components/Profile";
import Teams from "./components/Teams";

Conclusions & Resources ⭐️

In this article, we've been able to build complete and fully responsive cards using Chakra UI. I hope you found it helpful and interesting!

Here you will find the .zip file with today's project that contains the cards above!

Also, I really recommend to take a look and try Horizon UI, you will find more awesome cards like in this article, modern charts, and many other amazing UI elements. You will find them in a beautifully functional admin dashboard that is responsive to all devices! And is free & open-source!⚡️

Thanks for reading!

Cristian Fernando - May 12

Items.Title: 如何在 ASP.NET MVC 中使用 HttpClient 来使用 ASP.NET Web API REST 服务？ | How to use HttpClient in ASP.NET MVC to consume an ASP.NET Web API REST service?
Items.Description:
它是一种基于 REST 架构的轻量级、可扩展和可维护的服务，用于访问和操作通过 URL 标识的资源。

先决条件

要首先使用 Web API REST 服务，您需要创建 Web API REST 服务，然后在您创建的 IIS 服务器上发布和托管 Web 服务。 托管 Web 服务后，然后在客户端应用程序中使用此 API。

创建和托管 Web API 之后，现在我们开始逐步在 ASP.NET MVC 应用程序中使用 Web API REST 服务。

创建 MVC 应用程序

打开 Microsoft Visual Studio。 单击文件，然后单击新建，然后单击项目，选择 ASP.NET Web 应用程序，提供适当的名称并单击确定。

单击确定后，将出现以下窗口。 选择空和 MVC 选项，然后单击确定。

此步骤创建没有任何控制器和视图的简单 ASP.NET MVC 应用程序。 这就是您的项目在解决方案探索中的样子。

现在我们需要从 NuGet 安装 HttpClient 库

我们使用 HttpClient 来使用我们的托管 Web API REST 服务。 因此，为此，我们需要从 NuGet 包管理器安装 HttpClient 库。

右键单击应用程序名称，然后单击管理 NuGet 包。

阅读更多：在 Asp.net Mvc 5 中构建一个 Restful Api

什么是 HttpClient？

搜索 System.Net.Http 并单击安装按钮。 安装这个库需要几秒钟的时间。

现在我们需要从 NuGet 安装 WebAPI.Client 库
搜索 Microsoft.AspNet.WebApi.client 并单击安装按钮。 安装这个库需要几秒钟的时间。 我们需要安装所有必要的包来在我们的应用程序中使用 Web API REST 服务。

现在，我们已经安装了在 Web 应用程序中使用 Web API REST 服务所需的所有必要包。

创建模型类

现在，我们需要在模型文件夹中创建一个模型类。 右键单击 Model 文件夹并添加一个名为 Employee 的类。 右键单击控制器文件夹，单击添加并选择控制器。 从控制器列表中选择 Empty 模板，并为控制器提供适当的名称。

在我托管的 Web API RESET 服务中，我包含了两种方法，如下所示

  • 获取所有员工
  • 在控制器方法中，我们将调用返回所有员工详细信息的 GetAllEmployee 方法，我托管的 Web API REST 服务基本 URL 是http://192.168.45.1:6350/并根据您从我们指定的要求调用方法托管的 Web API REST 服务。 此 URL 是 URL 之后的基本 URL，它将是 API 控制器名称和 API 方法，如下所示。

    在前面的网址中

    • 雇员是 Web API 的控制器名称。
    • 正在寻找可靠的.NET 开发公司？ 您的搜索到此结束。

      在控制器中添加以下代码。

      员工控制器

      using ConsumingWebAPI.Models; using Newtonsoft.Json; using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Linq; using System.Net.Http; using System.Net.Http.Headers; using System.Threading.Tasks; using System.Web; using System.Web.Mvc; namespace ConsumingWebAPI.Controllers { public class EmployeeController: Controller { string Baseurl = "http://192.168.95.1:5555/"; public async Task<actionresult> Index() { List<employee> EmpInfo = new List<employee>(); using (var client = new HttpClient()) { client.BaseAddress = new Uri(Baseurl); client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Clear(); HttpResponseMessage Res = await client.GetAsync("api/Employee/GetAllEmployees"); if (Res.IsSuccessStatusCode) { var EmpResponse = Res.Content.ReadAsStringAsync().Result; EmpInfo = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<list<employee>>(EmpResponse); } return View(EmpInfo); } } public async Task<actionresult> Details() { List<employee> EmpDetails = new List<employee>(); using (var client = new HttpClient()) { client.BaseAddress = new Uri(Baseurl); client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Clear(); client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Accept.Add(new MediaTypeWithQualityHeaderValue("application/json")); HttpResponseMessage Res = await client.GetAsync("api/Employee/GetEmployeeById"); if (Res.IsSuccessStatusCode) { var record = Res.Content.ReadAsStringAsync().Result; EmpDetails = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<list<employee>>(record); } return View(EmpDetails); } } } } </list<employee></employee></employee></actionresult></list<employee></employee></employee></actionresult>

      创建视图

      现在，我们需要创建一个视图。 右键单击索引方法，单击添加视图并为其命名，然后为视图选择模型类。 在模板中选择列表，它将创建所需的索引视图。

      索引.cshtml

       @model IEnumerable<consumingwebapi.models.employee> @{ ViewBag.Title = "Index"; }<h2>Index</h2> <p> @Html.ActionLink("Create New", "Create")</p> @foreach (var item in Model) { } <table class="table"><tbody><tr><td></td></tr></tbody><tbody><tr><td></td><th> @Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.Name)</th><td></td><th> @Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.city)</th><td></td><th> @Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.EmailID)</th><td></td><th> @Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.Salary)</th><td></td><th></th><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td> @Html.DisplayFor(modelItem => item.Name)</td><td></td><td> @Html.DisplayFor(modelItem => item.city)</td><td></td><td> @Html.DisplayFor(modelItem => item.EmailID)</td><td></td><td> @Html.DisplayFor(modelItem => item.Salary)</td><td></td></tr></tbody></table> </consumingwebapi.models.employee>

      我们创建了一个详细的视图来让员工使用 id。

      详细信息.cshtml

       <xmp> @model ConsumingWebAPI.Models.Employee @{ ViewBag.Title = "Details"; } <h2>Details</h2> <div> <h4>Employee</h4> <hr /> <dl class="dl-horizontal"> <dt>@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.Name)</dt> <dd>@Html.DisplayFor(model => model.Name)</dd> <dt>@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.city)</dt> <dd>@Html.DisplayFor(model => model.city)</dd> <dt>@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.EmailID)</dt> <dd>@Html.DisplayFor(model => model.EmailID)</dd> <dt>@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.Salary)</dt> <dd>@Html.DisplayFor(model => model.Salary)</dd> </dl> </div> <p>@Html.ActionLink("Back to List", "Index")</p> </xmp>

      我们已经完成了所有的编码。

      现在，运行应用程序，您可以观察到预期的结果。

      结论

      在这篇博客中，我们学习了如何使用 HttpClient 使用 Asp.Net MVC 来使用 REST Web API 服务。 这有助于您理解 REST API 服务，以及在使用应用程序服务之前它是如何托管的。



原文:

REST services stand for Representational State Transfer. It is a lightweight, scalable and maintainable service that is built on REST architecture which is used to access and manipulate the resources identified through URL.

Prerequisites

To consuming Web API REST services first you need to create a Web API REST service and then publish and host the web service on the IIS server you created. After hosting the web service then consuming this API in the client application.

After creating and hosting web API Now we start consuming Web API REST service in our ASP.NET MVC application step by step.

Create MVC Application

Open Microsoft Visual studio. Click on File followed by NEW, then click on the project, select ASP.NET web application, give an appropriate name and click OK.

After clicking OK, the following window will appear. select Empty and MVC Options then click OK.

This step creates the simple ASP.NET MVC application without any controller and view. This is how your project should be like in solution Explore.

Now we need to Install the HttpClient library from NuGet

We use the HttpClient to consume our Hosted Web API REST service. So for this, we need to install the HttpClient library from NuGet Package Manager.

Right-click on the Application name and click on Manage NuGet Package.

Read More: Building A Restful Api In Asp.net Mvc 5

What is HttpClient?

HttpClient class provide a base class that is used to send HTTP request and receive HTTP response resources.

HttpClient sends and receives data from Web API URL which is hosted on the local IIS server.HttpClient can process multiple requests concurrently.

Search System.Net.Http and click on the install button. It will be taking few seconds for installing this Library.

Now we need to Install WebAPI.Client library from NuGet
Search Microsoft.AspNet.WebApi.client and click on the install button. It will be taking few seconds for installing this Library. We need to install all necessary packages to consume Web API REST services in our application.

Now, we have installed all the necessary packages require to consume Web API REST services in web applications.

Create Model Class

Now, we need to create a model class inside the model folder. Right-click on the Model folder and add a class named Employee. cs.

Employee.cs file


using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Web;
namespace ConsumingWebAPI.Models
{
public class Employee
{
public int Id { get; set; }
public string Name { get; set; }
public string city { get; set; }
public string EmailID { get; set; }
public long Salary { get; set; }
}
}

Right-click on the controller folder, click on Add and select controller. select the Empty template from the controller list and give the appropriate name to the controller.

In my hosted web API RESET services, I have included two methods, as given below

  • GetAllEmployee
  • GetEmployeeById

GetAllEmployee method handles HttpGET.GetEmployeeById handles HttpPOST this method takes employee id as a parameter in the method.

In the controller method, we are going to call the GetAllEmployee method that returns all the details employee, my hosted web API REST service base URL is http://192.168.45.1:6350/ and call the methods as per your requirement specified from our hosted web API REST services. This URL be a base URL after the URL it will be the API controller name and API method same as the following.

http://192.168.45.1:6350/api/Employees/GetAllEmployee

In the preceding URL

  • http://localhost:51910 This is the base address of my web API, It will be different as per your server.
  • API It is then used to differentiate between an MVC controller request Web API controller request.
  • Employees are the controller name of Web API.
  • GetAllEmployee is the Web API method that returns the list of all employees.
  • GetEmployeeById is the web API method that returns a record of an employee using employee id

Searching for Reliable .NET Development Company? Your Search ends here.

Add the following code inside the controller.

EmployeeController


using ConsumingWebAPI.Models;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Net.Http;
using System.Net.Http.Headers;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using System.Web;
using System.Web.Mvc;
namespace ConsumingWebAPI.Controllers
{
public class EmployeeController: Controller
{
string Baseurl = "http://192.168.95.1:5555/";
public async Task<actionresult> Index()
{
List<employee> EmpInfo = new List<employee>();
using (var client = new HttpClient())
{
client.BaseAddress = new Uri(Baseurl);
client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Clear();
HttpResponseMessage Res = await client.GetAsync("api/Employee/GetAllEmployees");
if (Res.IsSuccessStatusCode)
{
var EmpResponse = Res.Content.ReadAsStringAsync().Result;
EmpInfo = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<list<employee>>(EmpResponse);
}
return View(EmpInfo);
}
}
public async Task<actionresult> Details()
{
List<employee> EmpDetails = new List<employee>();
using (var client = new HttpClient())
{
client.BaseAddress = new Uri(Baseurl);
client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Clear();
client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Accept.Add(new MediaTypeWithQualityHeaderValue("application/json"));
HttpResponseMessage Res = await client.GetAsync("api/Employee/GetEmployeeById");
if (Res.IsSuccessStatusCode)
{
var record = Res.Content.ReadAsStringAsync().Result;
EmpDetails = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<list<employee>>(record);
}
return View(EmpDetails);
}
}
}
}
</list<employee></employee></employee></actionresult></list<employee></employee></employee></actionresult>

Create View

Now, we need to create a view. Right-click on the index method, click on Add view and give the name for it then select model class for the view. Select list in the template, it will create the required index view.

Index.cshtml

@model IEnumerable<consumingwebapi.models.employee>
@{
ViewBag.Title = "Index";
}<h2>Index</h2>
<p>
@Html.ActionLink("Create New", "Create")</p>
@foreach (var item in Model) {

}
<table class="table"><tbody><tr><td></td></tr></tbody><tbody><tr><td></td><th>
@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.Name)</th><td></td><th>
@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.city)</th><td></td><th>
@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.EmailID)</th><td></td><th>
@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.Salary)</th><td></td><th></th><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td>
@Html.DisplayFor(modelItem => item.Name)</td><td></td><td>
@Html.DisplayFor(modelItem => item.city)</td><td></td><td>
@Html.DisplayFor(modelItem => item.EmailID)</td><td></td><td>
@Html.DisplayFor(modelItem => item.Salary)</td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>
</consumingwebapi.models.employee>

we create a detailed view for getting employees using id.

Detail.cshtml

<xmp>
@model ConsumingWebAPI.Models.Employee
@{
ViewBag.Title = "Details";
}
<h2>Details</h2>
<div>
<h4>Employee</h4>
<hr />
<dl class="dl-horizontal">
<dt>@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.Name)</dt>
<dd>@Html.DisplayFor(model => model.Name)</dd>
<dt>@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.city)</dt>
<dd>@Html.DisplayFor(model => model.city)</dd>
<dt>@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.EmailID)</dt>
<dd>@Html.DisplayFor(model => model.EmailID)</dd>
<dt>@Html.DisplayNameFor(model => model.Salary)</dt>
<dd>@Html.DisplayFor(model => model.Salary)</dd>
</dl>
</div>
<p>@Html.ActionLink("Back to List", "Index")</p>
</xmp>

We have done all the coding.

Now, run the application and you can observe the expected result.

Conclusion

Here in this blog, we have learned how to consume REST Web API Services using HttpClient step by step using Asp.Net MVC. This helps you to comprehend REST API services, and how it is hosted before consuming services for the application.
Items.Author: harshalsuthar

Items.Title: 2022 年顶级移动应用程序开发趋势 | Top mobile app development trends in 2022
Items.Description:
使用移动设备访问互联网的趋势正在增强，移动网络的积极发展以及移动应用程序开发解决方案的不断创新就是证明。

为了接触更多消费者并改善客户体验，越来越多的公司正在选择基于最新数字创新的移动应用程序。 在本文中，我们将着眼于将在 2022 年起飞的顶级移动应用程序开发趋势，并解释它们如何帮助企业蓬勃发展。

您现在最常在 2022 年构建哪些类型的移动应用程序？ 近年来，跨平台解决方案的开发已成为移动应用程序开发的未来。 许多领域的竞争每天都在增加，如果你有创业的想法，你需要快速验证它。 创建原生应用程序需要花费大量时间和金钱，而且产品可能并不受欢迎。 因此，值得做出有利于跨平台的选择。 由于通用代码库，同时为两个平台（iOS 和 Android）开发产品需要更少的时间和预算。 此外，应用程序更新从内部进行 — 无需向 AppStore 和 GooglePlay 添加新版本。

我们已经提到跨平台开发的速度是原生开发的两倍，但即使是部分 React Native 代码也可以集成到现成的原生应用程序中。 因此，原本是原生开发的 Instagram，在其应用程序中添加了推送通知和帖子推广。

哪些类型的移动应用程序功能目前需求量很大？ 目前，以下类型的应用程序正在经常开发和升级：

物联网 (IoT) 应用集成
以下是移动应用程序如何改进物联网：

  • 为多个物联网设备提供单一的集中式平台；
  • 简单的设备控制，将大量设置缩小到 1-2 个按钮；
  • 通过访问生物识别应用程序或双因素身份验证提供更高的安全性；
  • 增加个性化，移动应用程序的每个用户都可以根据自己的喜好自定义物联网网络；
  • 让您随时随地管理物联网设备。

可穿戴设备的开发
可穿戴设备并不是小工具行业的新发明，但其受欢迎程度将在 2022 年继续增长。根据 Statista 的数据，2019 年有 7.22 亿部可穿戴设备，预计到 2022 年其数量将超过 10 亿部。

增强现实 (AR) 和虚拟现实
增强现实和虚拟现实（AR 和 VR）正在帮助公司真正脱颖而出，并提供全新水平的客户体验。 以下是公司如何使用 AR/VR 来改善客户体验：

  • 非接触式购物——一些公司，如 Gucci 和 Ikea，使用增强现实层，以便客户可以试验他们的产品； 他们可以试戴，比如新手表或改头换面，或者在任何地方想象他们想购买的产品，比如把宜家家具放在家里看看是否合适；
  • 身临其境的体验——例如，当公司创建 VR/AR 层以更好地吸引客户与其品牌或产品的互动时，可口可乐提出了客户在智能手机上玩的互动功能；
  • 改进的个性化——客户可以以自己的方式与品牌交流，例如，欧莱雅发明了一种名为 Only The Brave 的新男士香水，并通过该产品发布了一个虚拟现实世界，用户可以在其中体验他们在极端条件下的行为方式.

公司刚刚开始发现VR/AR 技术在提升品牌和营销活动方面的潜力。 然而，全球增强和虚拟现实市场预计将在 2020-24 年间增长 1251.9 亿美元。

即时应用
这样可以更轻松地浏览应用程序的内容，而无需安装应用程序。 这使客户可以快速决定是否要在手机上安装特定应用程序，还可以帮助企业更轻松地将其内容介绍给潜在客户。

以及： 信标技术 移动商务 人工智能 (AI) 移动钱包和移动支付 聊天机器人 卓越的应用安全性 预测分析 按需应用

云计算集成

前 12 个月后的移动应用程序维护有多重要？ 为什么？

产品发布后前 12 个月的服务和支持是关键，在此期间：

  • 在初始阶段没有考虑到的应用程序错误被揭示出来。
  • 正在根据前 300,000 名用户的反馈开发新的应用程序功能。
  • 应用程序的权利被转移并转移到公司内部部门的支持。


原文:

In 2020, the number of unique mobile Internet users reached 4.28 billion, which means that more than 90% of the global Internet population used mobile devices to access the Internet. The trend of using mobile gadgets to access the Internet is gaining momentum, as evidenced by the active development of mobile networks, as well as the constant innovations that appear in mobile application development solutions.

In order to reach more consumers and improve the customer experience, more and more companies are choosing mobile apps based on the latest digital innovations. In this article, we'll take a look at the top mobile app development trends that will take off in 2022 and explain how they can help businesses thrive.

1). What types of mobile apps do you most commonly build now in 2022? (Hybrid, Native, etc.)

In recent years, the development of cross-platform solutions has become the future of mobile application development. Well-known companies such as Facebook, Pinterest, Alibaba and others are using this solution to improve their productivity.

Competition is growing every day in many areas, and if you have an idea for a startup, you need to quickly validate it. Creating native applications takes a lot of time and money, and the product may not be in demand. Therefore, it is worth making a choice in favor of cross-platform. Due to the common code base, developing your product for two platforms at once - iOS and Android - takes less time and budget. Plus, app updates happen from the inside — without the need to add a new version to the AppStore and GooglePlay.

We have already mentioned that cross-platform development is twice as fast as native development, but even parts of the React Native code can be integrated into ready-made native applications. So Instagram, originally developed natively, added push notifications and post promotion to its application.

2). What types of mobile app features are currently in high demand? (Payment gateway, security, search functions, etc.) Why?

At the moment, the following types of applications are being developed and upgraded quite often:

Internet of Things (IoT) application integration
Here's how mobile apps improve the Internet of Things:

  • provide a single centralized platform for multiple IoT devices;
  • simple control of the device, narrowing down a significant number of settings to 1-2 buttons;
  • provide increased security through access to a biometric application or two-factor authentication;
  • increases personalization, when each user of the mobile application can customize the IoT network according to their preferences;
  • allow you to manage IoT devices anywhere and anytime.

Development for wearable devices
Wearable devices are not a new invention in the gadget industry, however, their popularity will continue to grow in 2022. According to Statista, there were 722 million wearable devices in 2019, and its number is projected to be over 1 billion by 2022.

Augmented Reality (AR) and Virtual Reality
Augmented and virtual reality (AR and VR) are helping companies truly stand out and provide a new level of customer experience. Here's how companies are using AR/VR to improve their customer experiences:

  • contactless shopping - some companies, such as Gucci and Ikea, use layers of augmented reality so that customers can experiment with their products; they can try them on, like a new watch or makeover, or visualize the product they want to buy anywhere, like putting Ikea furniture at home to see if it fits;
  • immersive experience - when companies create VR/AR layers to better engage their customers in the interaction with their brand or product, for example, Coca-Cola came up with interactive features that customers play with on their smartphones;
  • improved personalization - customers can communicate with the brand in their own way, for example, L'Oreal invented a new men's fragrance called Only The Brave, and with the product they released a virtual reality world where users can experience how they behave in extreme conditions.

Companies are just starting to discover the potential of VR/AR technologies to enhance brands and marketing campaigns. However, the global augmented and virtual reality market is expected to grow by $125.19 billion between 2020-24.

Instant Apps
Instant Apps is another innovation in mobile development. This makes it easier to browse the contents of the app without having to install the app. This allows customers to quickly decide if they want to install a particular app on their phone, and it also helps businesses more easily introduce their content to potential customers.

As well as: Beacon technology Mobile commerce Artificial Intelligence (AI) Mobile wallets and mobile payments Chatbots Superior application security Predictive Analytics Applications on demand

Cloud Computing Integration

3). How important is mobile app maintenance after the first 12 months? Why?

Service and support in the first 12 months after a product launch is key, here during this period:

  • application bugs that were not taken into account at the initial stage are revealed.
  • new application features are being developed based on feedback from the first 300,000 users.
  • the rights to the application are transferred and transferred for support to the internal divisions of the company.

Items.Title: 了解 Laravel Gates 和角色和权限策略 | Understand Laravel Gates and Policies for Roles & Permissions
Items.Description:
伊布拉·侯赛因

发表于在Laravel 中实现角色和权限以及如何使用它们并不是一件容易的事，尤其是了解Laravel中的Gates和Policy 。

有许多软件包可以帮助你解决它，安装它并立即使用它，而无需深入了解理解Gates和Policy 以及如何将它们与 Laravel一起使用的复杂性。

我在Laravel News上找到了这篇由PovilasKorop撰写的文章，它以非常简单的方式解释了你需要理解的所有点点滴滴。

参考

  • https://laravel-news.com/laravel-gates-policies-guards-explained https://laravel-news.com/laravel-gates-policies-guards-explained



原文:

Ibrar Hussain

Posted on May 17

In Laravel implementing Roles & Permission and how to use them is not an easy feat, especially understanding the Gates and Polices in Laravel.

There are numerous packages available to help you out with it, install it and straight away use it without digging into the complexity of understanding Gates and Polices and how to use them with Laravel.

I have found this article on Laravel News written by PovilasKorop which explains all the bits and pieces you need to understand in a very simple way.

References

Items.Author: ibrarturi

Items.Title: 科莫互联网功能？ | Como a internet funciona?
Items.Description:
互联网 ea web

Quando navegamos na Web com nossos navegadores, normalmente utilizamos os nomes de domínios para chegar a um website. Quando navegamos na Web com nossos navegadores, normalmente utilizamos os nomes de domínios para chegar a um 网站。 Isto significa que a Internet ea Web são a mesma coisa? Isto significa que a Internet ea Web são a mesma coisa？ Não tão simples assim. Não tão simples assim。 Como vimos, a Internet é uma infraestrutura técnica que permite conectar bilhões de computadores. Como vimos, Internet é uma infraestrutura técnica que permite conectar bilhões de computadores。 Entre estes computadores, alguns computadores (chamados de servidores Web) podem enviar mensagens inteligíveis para navegadores Web. Entre estes computadores, alguns computadores (chamados de servidores Web) podem enviar mensagens inteligíveis para navegadores Web。 A Internet é a infraestrutura, enquanto a Web é um serviço construído sob esta infraestrutura. Internet é a infraestrutura，enquanto Web é um serviço contruído sob esta infraestrutura。 Vale a pena notar que existem diversos outros serviços que funcionam na Internet, tais como email e IRC. Vale a pena notar que existem diversos outros serviços que funcionam na Internet, tais como email e IRC.



原文:

Basicamente a internet é uma gigantesca rede de computadores que se comunicam juntos.

Quando dois computadores precisam se comunicar, você precisa conectá-los, seja fisicamente (normalmente com um cabo de rede) ou de uma forma sem fio (por exemplo com sistemas WiFi ou Bluetooth). Todos os computadores modernos suportam alguma dessas conexões.

Uma rede não é limitada a dois computadores. Você pode conectar quantos computadores desejar. Mas isto se torna complicado. Se você está tentando conectar, digamos, dez computadores você irá precisar de 45 cabos, com 9 conexões por computador.

Para resolver este problema, cada computador na rede está conectado à um pequeno computador especial chamado de roteador. Este roteador tem um único trabalho: como um sinalizador em uma estação de trem, ter certeza de que a mensagem enviada por um determinado computador chegue ao computador destinatário corretamente. Para enviar uma mensagem para o computador B, o computador A deve enviar a mensagem para o roteador, que por sua vez encaminha a mensagem para o computador B e tem a certeza de que a mensagem não foi entregue ao computador C.

Uma vez que nós adicionamos um roteador no sistema, nossa rede de 10 computadores apenas necessitará de 10 cabos: uma única conexão para cada computador e um roteador com 10 conexões.

Uma rede de redes

Por enquanto, tudo bem. Mas como conectar centenas, milhares, bilhões de computadores? Claro que um único roteador não pode se adaptar para tanto, mas, se você ler com cuidado, nós dissemos que um roteador é um computador como qualquer outro, então o que nos impede de conectar dois roteadores juntos? Nada, então façamos isto.

Conectando computadores a roteadores, e então roteadores a roteadores, nós podemos escalar nossa rede infinitamente.

Esta rede é muito parecida com o que chamamos de Internet, mas alguma coisa está faltando. Nós construimos tais redes para nossos próprios fins. Existem outras redes além das nossas ligadas em outros lugares: nossos amigos, vizinhos, qualquer pessoa que tenha uma rede de computadores. Mas é inviável ligarmos cabos entre nossas casas e o resto do mundo, então como nos podemos lidar com isso? Muito bem, já existem cabos ligados a sua casa, como por exemplo, cabos de eletricidade e telefone. A estrutura do telefone já conecta nossa casa com o resto do mundo. Para conectar nossa rede a rede telefônica, precisamos de um equipamento especial chamado modem. Este modem transforma a informação da nossa rede em uma informação gerenciavel pela rede telefônica e vice-versa.

Então nós estamos conectados à infraestrutura telefônica. O próximo passo é enviar mensagens da nossa rede para a rede que nós desejamos alcançar. Para fazer isto, vamos precisar conectar nossa rede a um Provedor de Serviço de Internet (ISP, em inglês). Um ISP é uma companhia que gerencia alguns roteadores especiais que são conectados e pode também acessar roteadores de outros ISPs. Então a mensagem da nossa rede é transportada para a rede de redes do ISP e então para a rede de destino. A Internet é composta por toda esta infraestrutura de redes.

A internet e a web

Quando navegamos na Web com nossos navegadores, normalmente utilizamos os nomes de domínios para chegar a um website. Isto significa que a Internet e a Web são a mesma coisa? Não tão simples assim. Como vimos, a Internet é uma infraestrutura técnica que permite conectar bilhões de computadores. Entre estes computadores, alguns computadores (chamados de servidores Web) podem enviar mensagens inteligíveis para navegadores Web. A Internet é a infraestrutura, enquanto a Web é um serviço construído sob esta infraestrutura. Vale a pena notar que existem diversos outros serviços que funcionam na Internet, tais como email e IRC.
Items.Author: jhonatamsantos

Items.Title: 面向初学者的 Gatsby Graphql 模式定制 | Gatsby Graphql schema customization for beginners
Items.Description:
这样的层打开了很多可能性，并且是插件大生态系统的关键部分。 您可以使用 Graphql 从 CMS 获取数据、查询图像、借助各种插件查询基于降价的内容。

这一切都是可能的，因为这些插件从源中获取数据并在构建期间将其转换为 Graphql 节点。 在大多数情况下，它已经绰绰有余了，你甚至不需要成为 Graphql 的高手就可以使用 Gatsby 并构建很酷的东西。

但今天我想谈谈 Gatsby 的 Schema Customization API，因为它在某些情况下可以极大地提高项目的质量。

此 API 允许与 Graphql 数据层交互并按照您想要的方式对其进行自定义。 它可以帮助扩展当前的 Graphql 类型或创建全新的类型。

用例

作为初学者，您可能会从使用以下常见场景中受益：

  • 替换现有 Graphql 字段中的数据
  • 向现有 Graphql 类型添加一个新字段并用一些数据填充它
  • 定义 Graphql 类型之间的关系

替换现有 Graphql 字段中的数据

当您想为现有字段定义默认值时，此技术非常有用。 例如，您有一个博客，其中包含来自 Markdown 的文章，其中一些具有标志draft: true但其他没有。 为了更好地过滤，您需要确保每个博客文章在 Graphql 中都有一个带有false或true值的草稿字段。

有两种方法可以实现这一目标。 第一个是使用 Gatsby 提供的onCreateNode API ( docs )。 只需转到gatsby-node.js并添加这些行。

 exports . onCreateNode = ({ node , actions }) => { const { createNodeField } = actions ; if ( node . frontmatter ) { createNodeField ({ node , name : ' isDraft ' , value : node . frontmatter . isDraft || false , }); } };

每次创建节点时都会调用此代码，因此最好通过某些参数过滤那里的节点以仅将字段添加到相关节点。 这是一个快速的解决方案，但它有点原始。 如您所见，markdown frontmatter 数据中的原始isDraft字段保持不变，我们在该节点的fields目录下创建一个新字段。

为了获得更好的性能，我们可以通过使用自定义解析器覆盖原始字段来使用更精细的方法。 这种方法需要更多的知识。 我们需要知道我们想要修改的确切 Graphql 类型。 要知道类型的确切名称，我们可以使用特殊标志GATSBY_GRAPHQL_IDE=playground npm start运行 Gatsby。 这样我们将在[http://localhost/__graphql](http://localhost/__graphql)上看到 GraphQL Playground 而不是 GraphqiQL IDE，我们可以在那里获得所需的信息。

打开Schema面板，使用Ctrl+F查找类型。 一旦我们找到它，我们可以看到我们正在寻找的类型是MdxFrontmatter并且字段 isDraft 有一个Boolean类型。 因此，在gatsby-node.js中声明的 createResolvers API ( docs ) 的帮助下，我们可以为该字段定义一个默认值。

 exports . createResolvers = ({ createResolvers }) => { createResolvers ({ MdxFrontmatter : { isDraft : { type : ' Boolean ' , resolve : ({ isDraft }) => isDraft || false , }, }, }); };

如您所见， isDraft 字段中没有更多的空值，它具有false或true值。

向现有的 Graphql 类型添加一个新字段并用一些数据填充它

我们只是想出了如何修改现有数据，但让我们更进一步，添加一个全新的字段。 让我们看看我们网站上的这个例子。 我们有存储在 Markdown 中的开源项目的案例研究，我们希望在构建期间从 GitHub 获取每个项目的星数。 这是 Gatsby Graphql 模式定制的完美任务。

因此，对于每个案例研究，我想声明一个字段githubStars并告诉 Gatsby 从 GitHub API 获取数据。 我们已经使用 createResolvers 函数进行字段修改，但它也可以添加一个新字段。

从 Graphql Playground 中，我们可以获取一个用于 markdown 文件的类型，即Mdx ，然后以这种方式添加一个新字段。

 exports . createResolvers = ({ createResolvers }) => { createResolvers ({ Mdx : { githubStars : { type : ' String ' , resolve : async ({ frontmatter , fileAbsolutePath }) => { const { name , githubUsername , githubRepoName , isOpenSource } = frontmatter ; if ( fileAbsolutePath . includes ( ' /case-studies/ ' ) && isOpenSource && githubUsername && githubRepoName ) { try { const response = await fetch ( `https://api.github.com/repos/ ${ githubUsername } / ${ githubRepoName } ` ); const { stargazers_count } = await response . json (); return new Intl . NumberFormat ( ' en-US ' ). format ( stargazers_count ); } catch ( e ) { throw new Error ( `Failed to fetch GitHub stars for case study " ${ name } "` ); } } return null ; }, }, }, }); };

解析函数接收所有节点数据，因此很容易根据某些规则过滤 mdx 文件，例如文件位置文件夹。 解析器可以是一个异步函数，因此也可以从那里进行外部调用。

定义 Graphql 类型之间的关系

另一个常见的用例。 你有一个降价博客，你有一个 JSON 格式的作者列表。 您想从 Graphql 层获取所有数据，因此作者嵌套到博客文章数据中。 这可以通过gatsby-node.js中的createSchemaCustomization钩子使​​用createTypes API ( docs ) 来实现。

但是，博客文章内容可能是这样的：

 // content/posts/example.md --- title : ' Taking automated web page screenshots with Puppeteer and Sharp ' summary : A step - by - step tutorial on how to create perfect high - resolution web page screenshots automatically . No fuss , it just works . author : Alex Barashkov cover : cover . jpg category : Development --- ... Blog post content

如您所见，我们在 frontmatter 帖子数据中有作者的姓名，在authors.json中有相同的姓名。 现在的目标是当我们获取帖子数据时，让作者可以通过 Graphql 作为嵌套对象访问。

注意：对于博客文章，我们使用gatsby-plugin-mdx来获取 JSON 数据到 Graphql - gatsby-transformer-json 。 在此处查看项目的完整示例。

这是gatsby-config.js中的一个配置，它使这种采购发生：

 { resolve : ' gatsby-source-filesystem ' , options : { name : ' posts ' , path : ` ${ __dirname } /content/posts` , }, }, { resolve : ' gatsby-source-filesystem ' , options : { name : ' post-authors ' , path : ` ${ __dirname } /content/posts/post-authors.json` , }, },

我们使用与之前相同的策略：让我们打开 Graphql Playground。 我们已经知道 Graphql 类型的 markdown 文件，但是我们需要找到一种基于 JSON 的节点。 在我们的例子中，它将是PostAuthorsJson 。

有了这些信息，我们可以将createSchemaCustomization添加到gatsby-node.js并使用一个名为createTypes的函数。 该技术允许修改 Graphql 模式。

注意：如果要完全覆盖现有的 Graphql 类型，请在类型定义 ( docs ) 附近使用@dontInfer指令。

有一些选项可以手动定义嵌套关系。 但是，最简单的选择是使用内置的@link指令。 将其视为基于提供的外键关系在两个 Graphql 类型之间进行映射的助手。

让我们来看看。 将此代码添加到gatsby-node.js并查看结果。

 exports . createSchemaCustomization = ({ actions }) => { const { createTypes } = actions ; createTypes ( ` type Mdx implements Node { author: PostAuthorsJson @link(by: "name", from: "frontmatter.author") } ` ); };

现在作者链接到降价节点。 通过这种方式，您可以获取嵌套数据，甚至可以按作者信息过滤结果。

概括

现在您知道如何修改 Gatsby Graphql 模式了，我希望它对您的项目有用。 所有三个示例都可以在我们的 GitHub 网站存储库中找到。

想了解更多关于 Gatsby、Next.js、React 和 Headless CMS 的信息，请在Twitter 上关注我。



原文:

Gatsby has one big difference from other frameworks: it has a built-in Graphql data layer. Such a layer opens a lot of possibilities and is a key part of the big ecosystem of plugins. You can fetch data from CMS using Graphql, query images, query markdown based content with a help of a variety of plugins.

It’s all possible because those plugins fetch data from sources and transform it into Graphql Nodes during build time. In most cases, it’s more than enough, and you even don’t need to be a master of Graphql to use Gatsby and build cool things.

But today I want to talk about Gatsby’s Schema Customization API, since it could drastically improve the quality of projects in certain cases.

What is Gatsby’s Schema Customization API?

This API allows to interact with a Graphql data layer and customize it the way you want. It could help extend the current Graphql types or create completely new ones.

Use cases

As a beginner, you would probably benefit from using the following common scenarios:

  • Replacing data in the existing Graphql field
  • Adding a new field to existing Graphql type and filling it with some data
  • Defining relationships between Graphql types

Replacing data in the existing Graphql field

This technique is really helpful when you want to define a default value for an existing field. For example, you have a blog that has articles coming from markdown, and some of them have a flag draft: true but others do not. For better filtering, you want to make sure that every blog post has a draft field with either false or true value in Graphql.

There are two ways to achieve that. First one is using onCreateNode API (docs) that is provided by Gatsby. Just go to gatsby-node.js and add these lines.

exports.onCreateNode = ({ node, actions }) => { const { createNodeField } = actions; if (node.frontmatter) { createNodeField({ node, name: 'isDraft', value: node.frontmatter.isDraft || false, }); }
};

This code will be invoked on each Node creation, so it’s good to filter nodes there by certain parameters to add a field only to the relevant nodes. It’s a quick solution, but it is a bit raw. As you can see, the original isDraft field from markdown frontmatter data remains untouched, and we create a new one in that node under fields directory.

For better performance, we can use a more granular approach by overriding the original field with a custom resolver. This method requires some more knowledge. We will need to know the exact Graphql type we want to modify. To know the exact name of the type, we can run Gatsby with a special flag GATSBY_GRAPHQL_IDE=playground npm start. This way we will see GraphQL Playground instead of GraphqiQL IDE on [http://localhost/__graphql](http://localhost/__graphql), and we can get the required information there.

Open the Schema panel, find a type using Ctrl+F. Once we have found it, we can see that the type we’re looking for is MdxFrontmatter and the field isDraft has a Boolean type. So with a help of createResolvers API (docs) declared in gatsby-node.js we can define a default value for the field.

exports.createResolvers = ({ createResolvers }) => { createResolvers({ MdxFrontmatter: { isDraft: { type: 'Boolean', resolve: ({ isDraft }) => isDraft || false, }, }, });
};

As you can see, there are no more null values in isDraft field and it has either false or true values.

Add a new field to the existing Graphql type and fill it with some data

We just figured out how to modify the existing data, but let’s go further and add a completely new field. Let’s look at this example from our website. We have case studies for open source projects stored in markdown, and we want to have the number of stars from GitHub to be fetched during build time for each one of them. It’s a perfect task for Gatsby Graphql schema customization.

So for each case study I want to declare a field githubStars and tell Gatsby to fetch data from the GitHub API. We already used createResolvers function for field modification, but it also could add a new field.

From Graphql Playground we can grab a type that used for markdown files, which will be Mdx, and then add a new field this way.

exports.createResolvers = ({ createResolvers }) => { createResolvers({ Mdx: { githubStars: { type: 'String', resolve: async ({ frontmatter, fileAbsolutePath }) => { const { name, githubUsername, githubRepoName, isOpenSource } = frontmatter; if ( fileAbsolutePath.includes('/case-studies/') && isOpenSource && githubUsername && githubRepoName ) { try { const response = await fetch( `https://api.github.com/repos/${githubUsername}/${githubRepoName}` ); const { stargazers_count } = await response.json(); return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US').format(stargazers_count); } catch (e) { throw new Error(`Failed to fetch GitHub stars for case study "${name}"`); } } return null; }, }, }, });
};

Resolve function receives all node data, so it’s easy to filter mdx files based on certain rules e.g., file location folder. Resolver can be an async function so it’s ok to do external calls from there too.

Define relationships between Graphql types

Another common use case. You have a blog in markdown, and you have a list of authors in JSON. You want to fetch all data from a Graphql layer, so the author is nested to a blog post data. This could be achieved with createSchemaCustomization hook from gatsby-node.js using createTypes API (docs).

The structure of the JSON author object could be like this:

/// content/posts/post-authors.json
[ { "name": "Alex Barashkov", "photo": "../../src/images/post-authors/alex-barashkov.jpg", "description": "CEO at Pixel Point and software engineer with 10+ years of web development experience. Currently focused on React, Next.js, Gatsby.", "twitterUrl": "https://twitter.com/alex_barashkov" }, ... more authors
]

The blog post content, however, could be like this:

// content/posts/example.md
---
title: 'Taking automated web page screenshots with Puppeteer and Sharp'
summary: A step-by-step tutorial on how to create perfect high-resolution web page screenshots automatically. No fuss, it just works.
author: Alex Barashkov
cover: cover.jpg
category: Development
---
... Blog post content

As you can see, we have a name of the author in a frontmatter post data and the same name in authors.json. Now the goal is to make the author accessible via Graphql as a nested object when we fetch post data.

Note: For blog posts we use gatsby-plugin-mdx, for sourcing JSON data to Graphql - gatsby-transformer-json. See the full example of the project here.

Here is a config from the gatsby-config.js that makes this sourcing happen:

{ resolve: 'gatsby-source-filesystem', options: { name: 'posts', path: `${__dirname}/content/posts`, }, }, { resolve: 'gatsby-source-filesystem', options: { name: 'post-authors', path: `${__dirname}/content/posts/post-authors.json`, }, },

We use the same strategy as before: let’s open Graphql Playground. We already know the Graphql type of markdown files, but we need to find a type of JSON based nodes. In our case, it will be PostAuthorsJson .

Having that information, we can add createSchemaCustomization to gatsby-node.js and use a function called createTypes. That technique allows to modify the Graphql schema.

Note: If you want to override the existing Graphql type completely, use @dontInfer directive near the type definition (docs).

There are some options to define nested relationships manually. However, the simplest option is to use a built-in @link directive. Think about it as a helper that does a mapping between two Graphql types based on provided foreign key relationships.

Let’s check it out. Add this code to the gatsby-node.js and see the result.

exports.createSchemaCustomization = ({ actions }) => { const { createTypes } = actions; createTypes(` type Mdx implements Node { author: PostAuthorsJson @link(by: "name", from: "frontmatter.author") } `);
};

Now authors are linked to markdown nodes. This way you can fetch nested data and even filter results by author’s information.

Summary

Now you know how to modify the Gatsby Graphql schema, and I hope you find it useful for your project. All three examples are available here in our GitHub website repository.

Want to learn more about Gatsby, Next.js, React and Headless CMS follow me on Twitter.

Items.Title: 减小 /var/log/journal 的大小 | Reduce size of /var/log/journal
Items.Description:
阿布登努尔

发表于您可以在 /etc/systemd/journald.conf 中使用此参数控制此目录的大小：

SystemMaxUse=50M

您可以强制进行日志轮换：

$ sudo systemctl kill --kill-who=main --signal=SIGUSR2 systemd-journald.service
 注意：如果上述信令方法不这样做，您可能需要重新启动日志服务以强制日志轮换。 您可以像这样重新启动服务：

sudo systemctl restart systemd-journald.service

亚历山大·奥莫罗昆瓦 - 亚历山大·奥莫罗昆瓦 - Feb 22 2月22日



原文:

abdennour

Posted on May 17

$ journalctl --disk-usage Journals take up 3.8G on disk.

You can control the size of this directory using this parameter in your /etc/systemd/journald.conf:

SystemMaxUse=50M

You can force a log rotation:

$ sudo systemctl kill --kill-who=main --signal=SIGUSR2 systemd-journald.service
NOTE: You might need to restart the logging service to force a log rotation, if the above signaling method does not do it. You can restart the service like so:

sudo systemctl restart systemd-journald.service

Alexander Omorokunwa - Feb 23

Alexander Omorokunwa - Feb 22
Items.Author: abdennour

Items.Title: 静态类型的终极讽刺 | The ultimate irony of static typing
Items.Description:
本文旨在展示静态类型在其安全性方面的某些方面。

考虑数学表达式：

 f(x) = x + 1 where x > 10

这个表达式很简单，即使对于那些认为他们不需要数学的程序员来说也是如此。

现在，请注意该函数是为任何大于 10 的 x 定义的。 例如，想象一个最小值为 11 的量表。

没有必要想太多的条件。 它只是一个任意选择的数字，用于演示编写所需函数的某些方面。

我们可以用 Python 或您选择的任何其他语言来制作它。

很简单，不是吗？

此外，我们将演示将 Python 称为强类型语言的含义。 对于字符串“11”，Python 会为我们抛出异常。

 # for string input "11" f ( "11" ) >>> TypeError (...)

虽然 Python 并不认为添加带有数字的字符串是一个好主意，但有些语言却不这么认为。

将其与弱类型 Javascript 进行比较：

通常，这不是我们希望看到的结果。

因此，我们认为强类型语言比弱类型语言更安全。

你的问题是：强类型等于静态类型吗？

答案是否定的！

动态类型不需要我们提前声明类型，而静态类型需要我们这样做，或者至少，我们需要为分析器提供足够的上下文来为我们推断类型。

由于 Python 允许支持可选的静态类型，让我们继续类型提示。 注意变量 x 的更改名称以突出显示潜在问题。

 def f ( bigger_than_ten : int ) -> int : return bigger_than_ten + 1

是不是更好更安全？ 奇怪的是，静态类型在骗我们。 我们不希望任何人认为小于 11 的整数是正确的输入，对吧？ 但它有效！

从数学的角度来看，这个函数的推理应该是这样的：既然保证输入大于 10，我们可以假设输出总是大于 11。

不幸的是，我们的代码不能保证这一点。 那么微小的修正呢？

 def f ( bigger_than_ten : int ) -> int : if bigger_than_ten > 10 : return bigger_than_ten + 1 else : raise ValueError ()

太棒了，不是吗？

现在，当涉及到静态类型时，您应该会看到最大的讽刺。

静态类型的支持者确实声称动态类型是不安全的，因为它会导致运行时异常，如下所示：

 f ( "11" ) >>> TypeError (...)

同时，当静态类型无法捕捉到意外的输入时，他们会毫不犹豫地把同样的灾难带到他们的头上。

如果您到目前为止一直在关注，那么关于动态和静态类型安全性的讨论应该是徒劳的，因为这里的主要罪魁祸首是引发可能会或可能不会被捕获的运行时异常的能力。

它们是不良副作用，应该避免。 在 Rust 或 Go 等最近的语言中，他们的设计者通过完全避免引发异常来解决这个问题。

感谢您的阅读。



原文:

This article aims to demonstrate certain aspects of static typing regarding its safety.

Consider the mathematical expression:

f(x) = x + 1 where x > 10

The expression is simple enough, even for coders who think they do not need mathematics.

Now, note the function is defined for any x bigger than 10. Imagine, for instance, a gauge with the lowest value being eleven.

There is no need to think too hard about the condition. It is just an arbitrarily chosen number to demonstrate certain aspects of writing the required function.

We can make it in Python or any other language of your choice.

Simple enough, isn't it?

Furthermore, we will demonstrate what it means when we call Python a strong-typed language. For string "11", Python will raise an exception for us.

# for string input "11"
 f("11") >>> TypeError(...)

While Python does not think adding strings with numbers is a great idea, some languages believe otherwise.

Compare it to weak-typed Javascript:

Usually, this is not the result we want to see.

Thus, we consider strong-typed languages safer than weak-typed ones.

The question for you is: Is strong-typed equal to statically-typed?

The answer is no!

Dynamic typing does not require us to declare types in advance, while static typing needs us to do so, or at least, we need to provide enough context for the analyzer to infer the types for us.

Since Python allows support for the optional static typing, let us proceed with type hints. Note the changed name of the variable x to highlight a potential problem.


def f(bigger_than_ten:int)->int: return bigger_than_ten + 1

Is it better and safer? Curiously enough, static typing is lying to us. We don't want anyone to think that an integer lower than 11 is the correct input, right? But it works!

From a mathematical perspective, the reasoning about the function should be as follows: since the input is guaranteed to be bigger than 10, we can assume the output is always bigger than 11.

Unfortunately, our code does not guarantee that. So what about a tiny correction?


def f(bigger_than_ten:int)->int: if bigger_than_ten > 10: return bigger_than_ten + 1 else: raise ValueError()

Wonderful, isn't it?

Right now, you should see the greatest irony when it comes to static typing.

Proponents of static typing do claim that dynamic typing is unsafe because it leads to exceptions in runtime, like this:

 f("11") >>> TypeError(...)

And in the same time, they do not hesitate to bring the very same disaster upon their heads when static typing fails to catch an unexpected input.

If you have followed so far, it should be evident that the discussion about safety in dynamic and static typing is futile since the main culprit here was the ability to raise runtime exceptions that might or might not be caught.

They are undesirable side effects and should be avoided. In recent languages like Rust or Go, their designers addressed the concern by avoiding raising exceptions at all.

Languages like Kotlin or F# tried to minimize the harmful impacts while staying compatible with the flagship languages of their platforms, i.e., Java and C#.

Thank you for reading.

Items.Title: 最终了解递归函数 | Finally Understanding Recursive Functions
Items.Description:
我曾经很难将注意力集中在递归函数上。 今天，我学习了递归的 3 个特性，使它们易于理解。

递归函数的3个特点：

  1. 递归函数具有由参数值表示的状态。
  2. 调用内部函数时，确保必须以某种方式修改参数（状态），使其更接近“中断条件”并最终满足它。
  3. 设置不再调用内部函数的“中断条件” （即中断递归）。

让我们看看例子。

功能#1

这将一直运行到堆栈溢出，因为它只是在不断地运行自己。

功能#2

 def run ( n ): # the state is represented by the value n run ( n ) # no break condition; no change of state (n) run ( 10 )

这也将一直运行，直到堆栈溢出，因为没有中断条件。

功能#3

 def run ( n ): if n == 10 : # break condition (always unsatisfied) run ( n ) # no change of state (n) run ( 10 )

这也将一直运行到堆栈溢出，因为状态 (n) 始终满足运行条件。

功能#4

 def run ( n ): if n == 10 : # break condition (always unsatisfied) run ( n ) # no change of state run ( 5 )

这将永远不会运行第二次，因为状态 (n) 永远不会满足再次运行的条件。

功能#5

 def run ( n ): if n < 1 : # breaking condition (satisfied until the state meets breaking condition) run ( n - 1 ) # continuous change of state run ( 10 )

这将递归运行，直到满足中断条件。

你有它。 递归函数具有由参数值表示的状态，并且需要最终满足函数的“中断条件”的状态 (n) 变化。

我希望这有帮助。



原文:

I used to have a hard time wrapping my mind around recursive function. Today, I learned 3 characteristics about recursion that makes them easy to understand.

The 3 characteristics of recursive functions:

  1. Recursive functions have a state that is represented by a parameter value.
  2. When calling the inner function, ensure that the parameter (state) must be modified in some way that brings it closer to the 'break condition' and eventually meet it.
  3. Set the 'break condition' for which the inner function is not called again (i.e. breaking the recursion).

Let's see examples.

Function #1

This will run until the stack overflows because it's just running itself continuously.

Function #2 

def run(n): # the state is represented by the value n
 run(n) # no break condition; no change of state (n)

run(10)

This will also run until the stack overflows because there is no breaking condition.

Function #3 

def run(n): if n == 10: # break condition (always unsatisfied)
 run(n) # no change of state (n)

run(10)

This will also run until the stack overflows because the state (n) always satisfies the condition for running.

Function #4 

def run(n): if n == 10: # break condition (always unsatisfied)
 run(n) # no change of state

run(5)

This will never run a second time because the state (n) never meets the conditions for running again.

Function #5 

def run(n): if n < 1: # breaking condition (satisfied until the state meets breaking condition)
 run(n-1) # continuous change of state

run(10)

This will run recursively until the breaking condition is met.

There you have it. A recursive function has a state that is represented by a parameter value and requires a change of state (n) which eventually meets the 'breaking condition' of the function.

I hope this helps.

Items.Title: MCIPFE - Cálculo Lambda | MCIPFE - Cálculo Lambda
Items.Description:
计算λ

乌玛索玛：

吨你是的一种是的是的一种吨你吨你吨你一种吨你一种一种吨你一种一种一种吨你吨你真 = \lambda x.\lambda y。 结论

书目

原文:

O Manual Completamente Incompleto de Programação Funcional com Elixir é uma série de postagens bem pequenas para explicar um pouco de programação funcional.

Cálculo lambda

"No início eram apenas funções"

O cálculo lambda é a abstração de um sistema formal da matemática lógica baseado na substituição e mapeamento de valores, sendo a base do conceito de funções puras que temos hoje.

Usando símbolo λ (lambda), seguido do nome do parâmetro e por fim a expressão.

Uma soma:

λx.  x+1(λx.  x+1)22+1=3 \lambda x.\;x + 1 \newline (\lambda x.\;x + 1)2 \newline 2+1 =3 λx.x+1(λx.x+1)22+1=3 

add_one = fn(x) -> x+1 end
add_one(2)
#3

No caso acima temos uma função simples que recebe um valor como parâmetro (x) e retorna a soma do parâmetro mais (+) 1, ou seja, substitui (x) por um valor e mapeia para expressão de (+1).

O poder de uma função

Com o conceito simples de mapeamento e substituição é possível construir qualquer coisa inclusive a lógica booleana.

Lógica booleana de forma extremamente resumida é ideia que no universo só existem dois estados Verdadeiro ou Falso, contendo operadores como E, OU e NÃO.

Vamos criar a lógica de Verdadeiro , Falso e o operador Negação.
O conceito de Negação é basicamente a inversão do valor booleano, dessa forma NÃO Falso é igual à Verdadeiro.

true=λx.λy.  xfalse=λx.λy.  y(λb.  b  false  true)true(true  false  true)=false(λb.  b  false  true)false(false  false  true)=true true = \lambda x.\lambda y. \;x \newline false = \lambda x.\lambda y. \;y \newline (\lambda b. \;b \;false \;true) true \newline (true\;false\;true) = false \newline (\lambda b.\; b \;false\; true) false \newline (false\;false\;true) = true true=λx.λy.xfalse=λx.λy.y(λb.bfalsetrue)true(truefalsetrue)=false(λb.bfalsetrue)false(falsefalsetrue)=true 
lambda_true = fn(x, _) -> x end lambda_false = fn(_, y) -> y end lambda_not = fn(bool) -> bool.(lambda_false,lambda_true) end print = fn(bool) -> IO.puts(bool.("true","false")) end print.(lambda_not.(lambda_true)) #false
print.(lambda_not.(lambda_false)) #true

Já no exemplo acima criamos duas funções true e false que recebem dois parâmetros x e y , a função true retorna somente o parâmetro x e a função false retorna somente o parâmetro y .
Para a negação precisamos criar uma outra função que mapeie uma função booleana, true ou false, em outra função booleana invertida.

Conclusão

Mas qual a função do cálculo lambda no dia à dia? O cálculo lambda é a base do que conhecemos hoje como uma função, entender esse conceito, mesmo que de forma mais superficial, é a porta de entrada para entender outros conceitos de programação funcional.

Items.Title: XNPV 函数 | XNPV Function
Items.Description:
获取一系列可能不是周期性的现金​​流的净现值 (NPV) 。

负值被视为付款。

  • 日期：它是对应于付款数组的日期数组。

    折扣率为10

  • 开始日期为 2018 年 6 月 30 日

  • 现金流是在它们对应的确切日期收到的

  • 开始日期和第一笔现金流之间的时间只有 6 个月。

    • 关于 XNPV 的注意事项

    1. 日期中的数字表示为整数
    2. 发生错误时；

    • 值和日期数组的长度不同

    • 任何其他日期早于开始日期

    • 或者

    • The given dates are not recognized by Excel as valid dates. Excel 无法将给定日期识别为有效日期。



    原文:

    Get the Net Present Value (NPV) for a series of cash flows that may not be periodic.

    XNPV uses specific dates that correspond to each cash flow being discounted in the series, whereas the regular** NPV Function** automatically assumes all the time periods are equal.

    XNPV FORMULA

    =XNPV(Rate, Cash Flows, Dates of Cash Flow)

    Rate: The discount rate to be used over the length of the period

    Values: This is an array of numeric values that represent the payments and income where;

    • Negative values are treated as outgoing payment.

    • ** Positive values** are treated as *income *

    Dates: It is an array of dates corresponding to an array of payments.

    XNPV IN Excel

    Assumptions in the XNPV Example

    • The discount rate is 10

    • Start date is June 30, 2018

    • Cash Flow are received on the exact date they correspond to

    • The time between the start date and first cash flow is only 6 months.

    The difference between the XNPV and NPV formulas is that XNPV recognizes that time period between the start date and first cash flow is only 6 months, while the NPV function treats it as a full-time period.

    Things to remember about XNPV

    1. Numbers in dates are indicated as integers
    2. XNPV doesn't discount the initial cash flow
    3. #NUM! error occurs when either;

    • The values and date arrays are of different length

    • Any of the other dates are earlier than the start date

    • #VALUE error - occurs when either;

    • The values or rates arguments are non-numeric; or

    • The given dates are not recognized by Excel as valid dates.

Items.Title: 在 AWS Amplify 上托管 sveltekit | Hosting sveltekit on AWS Amplify
Items.Description:
马克框架

发表于如果您使用的是@sveltejs/adapter-static ，这可能会派上用场！

转到 AWS Amplify 项目，在侧栏中单击App settings: Rewrites and redirects 、编辑、打开文本编辑器并粘贴以下内容。

 [ { "source" : "</^[^.]+$| \\ .(?!(svelte|css|gif|ico|jpg|js|png|txt|svg|woff|ttf)$)([^.]+$)/>" , "target" : "/index.html" , "status" : "200" , "condition" : null }, { "source" : "/<*>" , "target" : "/" , "status" : "404-200" , "condition" : null }
]

接下来将<base href="/" /> > 添加到app.html的<head />标记中。

The Amplify Redirect and Rewrite Config and the <base href="/" /> directs all the failed responses back to the index file, making any request that fails fall back to the sveltekit router. Amplify Redirect and Rewrite Config 和<base href="/" />将所有失败的响应引导回索引文件，使任何失败的请求回退到 sveltekit 路由器。

Sarit Chaet Hudis - Sarit Chaet Hudis - May 14 5月14日



原文:

Marc Frame

Posted on May 17

If you are using the @sveltejs/adapter-static this might come in handy!

Go to the AWS Amplify project, in the side bar click App settings: Rewrites and redirects, Edit, Open Text Editor and paste the following.

[ { "source": "</^[^.]+$|\\.(?!(svelte|css|gif|ico|jpg|js|png|txt|svg|woff|ttf)$)([^.]+$)/>", "target": "/index.html", "status": "200", "condition": null }, { "source": "/<*>", "target": "/", "status": "404-200", "condition": null }
]

next add a <base href="/" /> to the <head /> tag in the app.html.

The Amplify Redirect and Rewrite Config and the <base href="/" /> directs all the failed responses back to the index file, making any request that fails fall back to the sveltekit router.
